description_long: This sculpture depicts a mermaid-like female figure with long flowing hair, seated atop a stylized fish or sea creature. The figure's right arm is raised, resting on her head, while her left arm is bent and rests on her lap. The lower half of the sculpture transitions into a fish tail, complete with detailed scales and a curled fin. The facial features and hair are delicately carved, giving the figure a serene and contemplative expression. The sculpture appears to be made from a single piece of light-colored stone or marble, with some areas showing darker patina or weathering. The overall form is elongated and vertical, with intricate details on both the human and aquatic elements.
description: A detailed stone sculpture of a mermaid-like woman seated on a stylized fish, with flowing hair and a raised arm, carved from light-colored stone.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated profile of the sculpture, with the mermaid's hair and fish tail visible along the length.
description_view_1: Opposite side view highlighting the curvature of the mermaid's body and the detailed fish tail wrapping around the base.
description_view_2: Frontal view displaying the mermaid's face, raised arm, and the full detail of her upper body and the fish beneath her.
description_view_3: Side view from the other direction, emphasizing the mermaid's torso, arm position, and the intricate fish scales.
attribute_subject_matter: mermaid figure seated on a fish
attribute_location_context: No visible context or background; the sculpture is isolated against a plain backdrop.
